title: VinFast Callbot — Tech Stack Tối Ưu (Bản Hợp Nhất)
summary: Consolidated architecture decision record locking all technology choices for the VinFast callbot: Python 3.11, LangGraph StateGraph, PhoWhisper-CT2 ASR, Ollama+Qwen LLM, Piper TTS, and Vietnamese entity normalization as the core differentiator.
key_decisions: Architecture philosophy: Thin LLM + Thick State Machine — LLM handles only NLU/NLG; deterministic FSM (LangGraph) owns all slot state and field-selection logic
Dialogue runtime: LangGraph StateGraph chosen over hand-rolled FSM for native routing, checkpointing/interrupt, and alignment with VinSmart/XeCare stack
ASR: PhoWhisper-medium CT2 int8 as default (best Vietnamese WER on CPU); generic faster-whisper as fallback; large model on GPU for offline WER eval only
LLM: Qwen 7-8B via Ollama (Windows-native, OpenAI-compatible API, keep_alive for no cold-load); A/B with one Vietnamese-tuned variant doubles as ablation eval
TTS: Piper local ONNX as primary (reproducible offline, safe +5pts); interface pluggable via tts/base.py to allow edge-tts for video demo and viXTTS for GPU premium clip
Audio I/O: sounddevice + numpy over PyAudio (fewer Windows build issues, numpy-native buffers)
Vietnamese entity normalization: dedicated normalization/ module with per-field typed normalization post-LLM-extraction; parse_failed flag triggers exception #5 garbled readback
Structured output: Pydantic v2 + Ollama JSON/format mode (no instructor or outlines dependency)
Response strategy: template-first (deterministic, 2-3 variants); LLM called only for high-variance turns (emergency comfort, ambiguity, out-of-scope, closing)
Eval stack: pytest + confusion matrix + slot F1 + jiwer WER + LLM-as-judge (JUDGE_MODEL via .env, dev-time only) + latency p50/p95 + ablation study
Frontend: CLI for dev/eval iteration + Gradio for signature video demo
Secrets: python-dotenv + .env only; never hardcoded; .env.example documents required keys
No RAG for G_2/G_4 policy — static policy, time spent on eval instead
Hardware split: Zenbook CPU for live demo; GPU PC for offline WER eval and premium TTS clip only
